values.title: Industrial Innovation
values.description: Bridging the gap between traditional industry and modern technology. Applying engineering precision to manufacturing and rice processing.

values.title: Continuous Learning
values.description: From SolidWorks to server management - I stay sharp by constantly expanding my toolkit across both mechanical and software domains.

values.title: Impact-Driven Work
values.description: Every design and every line of code should serve a purpose. I focus on solutions that solve real problems in the real world.

values.title: Leadership
values.description: Leading cross-functional teams at Sufi Engineering - from factory floor technicians to software developers. I value mentorship, clear communication, and ownership.
